scripts.services:up: docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml up -d db redis
scripts.backend:up: yarn services:up && yarn shared:build && turbo run dev --filter=@pombo/api
scripts.backend:up-d: yarn services:up && yarn shared:build && (kill -9 $(lsof -ti tcp:4444) 2>/dev/null || true) && (turbo run dev --filter=@pombo/api > /tmp/pombo-api.log 2>&1 &) && echo 'backend detached on :4444 — logs: tail -f /tmp/pombo-api.log · stop: yarn backend:down'
scripts.backend:down: for p in 4000 4444; do kill -9 $(lsof -ti tcp:$p) 2>/dev/null || true; done; pkill -f 'tsx watch src/main.ts' 2>/dev/null || true; yarn services:down
scripts.dev: for p in 4000 4444; do kill -9 $(lsof -ti tcp:$p) 2>/dev/null || true; done; yarn backend:up-d && yarn web:up
scripts.build:web: turbo run build --filter=@pombo/web && node scripts/gen-web-version.mjs apps/web/dist
scripts.prisma:migrate: yarn services:up && yarn workspace @pombo/api prisma migrate dev
scripts.prisma:deploy: yarn services:up && yarn workspace @pombo/api prisma migrate deploy
scripts.prisma:reset: yarn services:up && yarn workspace @pombo/api prisma migrate reset --force
